title: Case E03: When Machines Sang to Hide State Secrets
description: Every night, a mechanical voice sang an English folk song before transmitting unbreakable government codes from Cyprus. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case E03: The Radio Station That Sang Before It Encrypted...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: A mechanical voice sang The Lincolnshire Poacher every night before transmitting unbreakable government codes. The operators remain anonymous and the intelligence completely unknown. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
Machines aren't supposed to sing but this one did every night before transmitting government codes that no one could break. The mechanical folk song created an uncanny valley effect that haunts radio enthusiasts to this day.

#horror #scary #paranormal #mystery #creepy #fyp #conspiracy #government #radio #numberstations #coldwar #truestory

instagram_metadata.video_caption: What happens when a machine sings a folk song before transmitting unbreakable government codes?
